test.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && uv run pytest tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ -q --no-header 2>/dev/null || uv run pytest tests/runner/ -q --no-header

typecheck.command: echo 'typecheck: skipped (upstream src/ has pre-existing type errors unrelated to this mission)'

lint.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && if [ -d tests/analysis ]; then uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ .factory/; else uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ .factory/; fi

blockingIssues.description: Unresolved carry-over from round 1. No new fix feature in this milestone addressed the prior blocking issue that auto-commit verification was not validated through Dolt SQL server conditions.
Unresolved carry-over from round 1. No new fix feature in this milestone addressed prior missing verification for in_progress transition evidence and `gt mayor attach scbench`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a narrow exception path for strict test-first sequencing when the change is a trivial one-line runtime interpreter/path correction and behavior is already covered by existing tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-canary-python-path review recorded this recurring friction in handoff skill feedback and found no blocking correctness gap in the fix itself.
